allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); servers=d.get\('mcpServers',{}\); [print\(k,json.dumps\(v,indent=2\)\) for k,v in servers.items\(\) if 'mongo' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'mcp' in k.lower\(\) or 'plugin' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('plugins', d.get\('mcpServers', {}\)\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); projects=d.get\('projects',{}\); [print\(k, json.dumps\(v,indent=2\)\) for k,v in projects.items\(\) if 'mongo' in str\(v\).lower\(\)]")
